title: v1alpha1RevisionHistory
description: v1alpha1RevisionHistory schema from Argo CD API

id.title: ID is an auto incrementing identifier of the RevisionHistory

revision.title: Revision holds the revision the sync was performed against

revisions.title: Revisions holds the revision of each source in sources field the sync was performed against

sources.title: Sources is a reference to the application sources used for the sync operation
